revision.comment: Restored revision 1046946977 by [[Special:Contributions/Paper9oll|Paper9oll]] ([[User talk:Paper9oll|talk]]): Unexplained blanking
revision.text: {{tracking category}} {{hidden category}} This is a tracking category for disambiguation pages. It enables us to use {{PAGESINCATEGORY:All article disambiguation pages}} to get the exact number of disambiguation pages in the main namespace. Pages are put in this category by templates such as {{tl|Disambiguation}} and {{tl|Airport disambiguation}}. That is, templates built with the {{tl|dmbox}} meta-template, which is doing the actual categorising. This category only lists pages in main (article) space. == See also == * [[:Category:All disambiguation pages]] – Lists disambig pages in all namespaces. * [[:Category:All set index articles]] – The corresponding category for set index articles. {{CatAutoTOC}} [[Category:Disambiguation pages|*]] [[Category:Article namespace categories]]

revision.comment: 1 revision imported
revision.text: {{tracking category}} {{hidden category}} This is a tracking category for disambiguation pages. It enables us to use {{PAGESINCATEGORY:All article disambiguation pages}} to get the exact number of disambiguation pages in the main namespace. Pages are put in this category by templates such as {{tl|Disambiguation}} and {{tl|Airport disambiguation}}. That is, templates built with the {{tl|dmbox}} meta-template, which is doing the actual categorising. This category only lists pages in main (article) space. == See also == * [[:Category:All disambiguation pages]] – Lists disambig pages in all namespaces. * [[:Category:All set index articles]] – The corresponding category for set index articles. {{CatAutoTOC}} [[Category:Disambiguation pages|*]] [[Category:Article namespace categories]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=All_article_disambiguation_pages here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=All_article_disambiguation_pages for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> <!--templates--> {{wikidata link|Q8235688}} <!--interwikis--> [[en:Category:All article disambiguation pages]] [[en:{subst:PAGENAME}]] <!--categories--> [[Category:Emmabot categories with enwiki]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments; consolidate 2 interlanguage link(s) into wikidata link template (has duplicate-language pairs) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/25263326738|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=All_article_disambiguation_pages for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{wikidata link|Q8235688|en|Category:All article disambiguation pages|en|{subst:PAGENAME}}}
[[Category:Emmabot categories with enwiki]] [[Category:Pages with interwikis with duplicate languages]]
